teacherGuide.conceptGu: Speed round = fluency build. ઝડપ = confidence. Numbers 10-20 range. Adaptive — સારો perform = harder numbers. Struggle = easier.
teacherGuide.conceptEn: Speed builds fluency. Adaptive difficulty tracks performance.
teacherGuide.storyGu: 'Yuval, robot calculator ની speed test! Computer 1 second માં million additions — taru brain ped ni speed?!'
teacherGuide.scriptGu: 'Ready? Timer start! ઝડપ important છે — brain ko train karo!'
teacherGuide.tipsGu: 💡 First time slow is fine! Track personal best. Celebrate improvement not perfection!

questions.textEn: 10 questions — as fast as you can! Timer: 60 seconds
questions.hintGu: Fingers use OK! ઝડપ later આવશે.
questions.hintEn: Use fingers if needed — speed comes with practice!

questions.textGu: 🤖 Robot ના 8 gears ઉજવ્યા. 6 more found. Total gears?
questions.textEn: Robot had 8 gears. Found 6 more. Total gears?
